headline: 2026 Travelers Championship Generates More Than $5 Million for Charity
summary: HARTFORD, Conn., June 29, 2026--The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) today announced that the 2026 Travelers Championship generated more than $5 million for more than 270 charities – both tournament records. The PGA TOUR Signature Event was won by Viktor Hovland in a Monday playoff and marked the 20th consecutive tournament with Travelers as title sponsor.

headline: Strength Seen in Bowhead Specialty Holdings Inc. (BOW): Can Its 5.3% Jump Turn into More Strength?

headline: Affordable American Insurance (AAI) Announces Hiring of Salvatore Morello as EVP of Agency & Carrier Relations
